title: One Piece: Episode of Alabasta - The Desert Princess and the Pirates
original_title: 劇場版ワンピース エピソードオブアラバスタ 砂漠の王女と海賊たち
overview: The Straw Hat Pirates are on a quest to save the desert kingdom of Alabasta. A civil war brews among the sands, one started and stirred by the hand of none other than Crocodile and his corrupted Baroque Works gang. The stakes run ever higher as Princess Vivi's homeland threatens to tear itself apart. More than lives are on the line.
